description:
## Problem

Warning during test runs:
```
warning: redefining module MockRepo (current version defined in memory)
```

## Root Cause

MockRepo is defined 4 times across the umbrella:
- apps/bedrock_hca/test/test_helper.exs
- apps/bedrock_directory/test/test_helper.exs  
- apps/bedrock_job_queue/test/test_helper.exs
- apps/bedrock_core/test/test_helper.exs

When tests run together or the test suite is compiled in the same VM session, Mox.defmock gets called multiple times.

## Fix Options

1. **Shared mock module**: Create `apps/bedrock/test/support/mocks.ex` and require it from each app's test_helper.exs

2. **Conditional definition**: Use `Code.ensure_loaded?/1` to skip if already defined:
```elixir
unless Code.ensure_loaded?(MockRepo) do
  Mox.defmock(MockRepo, for: Bedrock.Repo)
end
```

Option 2 is simpler and works with the current structure.
title: Fix MockRepo redefinition warning in umbrella tests
